headline: Southwest Airlines (LUV): The Most Undervalued Growth Stock to Buy Right Now
summary: Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE:LUV) is one of the 8 Most Undervalued Growth Stocks to Buy Right Now. On June 1, 2026, Morgan Stanley raised the firm’s price target on Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE:LUV) to $60 from $55 previously and maintained an Overweight rating on the shares. On May 28, 2026, Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE:LUV) announced […]
